product_basic_kyc.product_name: Nikitavibhor Natural Diamond Green Set - Elegant Emerald Necklace & Earrings Jewellery
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Indian women, age 25-45, interested in premium traditional and festive jewellery
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Wearing during traditional Indian festivals, weddings, and special occasions
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for Indian festivals such as Diwali, Karva Chauth, Navratri, and wedding ceremonies

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Represents traditional Indian craftsmanship combining natural diamonds with green emerald beads, aligning with Indian ethnic aesthetics and auspicious colors
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Worn with sarees, lehengas, and ethnic dresses at home during festivals, social gatherings, weddings, and cultural events
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Traditional elegance meets modern sophistication for the discerning Indian woman; suitable for celebratory and auspicious Indian settings
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Symbolizes blessings, prosperity, and family heritage; cherished as a valuable investment and statement piece in Indian households

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Nikitavibhor Natural Diamond Green Set Necklace & Earrings - Premium Traditional Indian Jewellery
bullet_points: Exquisite combination of natural diamonds and green emerald beads for authentic ethnic appeal
Intricately designed floral motifs with fine craftsmanship suitable for festive and wedding wear
Lightweight and comfortable to wear for extended events and ceremonies
Perfect gifting option for Indian festivals, weddings, and special occasions
Includes matching necklace and earrings set to complete your traditional look effortlessly
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your ethnic wardrobe with the Nikitavibhor Natural Diamond Green Set. Featuring dazzling diamonds and vibrant emerald beads, this finely crafted jewellery set is perfect for Indian festivals and weddings.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Close-up visuals highlighting diamond and emerald detailing
Lifestyle images featuring models wearing ethnic attire during Indian weddings
Section explaining gemstone authenticity and craftsmanship
Styling guide for pairing with sarees and lehengas
Gift packaging and festive gifting presentation visuals

long_tail_keywords: natural diamond and emerald necklace set for weddings
traditional Indian diamond jewellery for festivals
fine craftsmanship diamond earrings and necklace set
premium Indian bridal emerald and diamond jewellery
Nikitavibhor natural diamond green jewellery set for women
image_specific_keywords: gold and diamond earrings with green stones
necklace and earrings set on velvet display stand
traditional Indian jewellery with green gemstones

visual_improvements: Use rich yet warm backgrounds reflecting Indian culture (e.g. ethnic home settings, festive décor)
Incorporate natural lighting to enhance gemstone colors authentically
Feature diverse Indian women styling jewellery in various traditional attires
Offer macro shots focusing on design intricacies without over-editing
Showcase usage in different Indian occasion settings beyond weddings
messaging_improvements: Highlight the significance of natural diamonds and emeralds in Indian tradition
Emphasize multi-occasion usability: festivals, weddings, gifting
Communicate craftsmanship and handmade quality clearly
Include gemstone authenticity assurance in descriptions
Create emotional connection linking jewellery to family heritage
lifestyle_positioning: Position as an essential jewellery piece for both daily festive wear and grand occasions
Visual storytelling around ceremonies like Karva Chauth, Diwali, and Navratri
Display versatility in pairing with sarees, salwar suits, and lehengas
Highlight gifting moments in Indian families
trust_premium_perception: Present as a trustworthy luxury brand specializing in natural stones
Show certification or expert appraisal visuals
Leveraging brand history and website as authenticity anchors
Offer customer testimonials or story-driven content

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Preserve exact design, color, and branding of the diamond and emerald necklace and earrings set as shown in provided images
recommended_image_angles: Close-up macro shots of diamond floral designs
Side profiles showing bead string details
Model wearing full set from neck-up angle
recommended_real_life_environments: Traditional wedding or mehndi ceremony backdrop
Warm, cozy indoor spaces with cultural décor
Model wearing set with saree or lehenga in daylight
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Use soft, warm professional lighting to highlight gemstone depth without harsh reflections; natural daylight simulation preferred for lifestyle shots
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimal backgrounds focusing on product clarity with warm cream or beige tones; premium feel with subtle ethnic cues for authenticity

suitable_backgrounds: Velvet or suede in warm brown or dark green shades
Neutral gradient backdrops with subtle cultural motifs
Festive diya or marigold soft-focus elements
lifestyle_scenarios: Woman dressed in saree putting on the necklace before a festival
Bride preparing with close-up on the jewellery
Close-up of hands adjusting earrings beside a puja thali
Festive family gathering showing jewellery as gift
Jewellery box opened with soft sunlight
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top or bottom margin areas of lifestyle images; avoid overlapping product details, prefer clean side margins on product-only images
what_must_be_avoided: Heavy digital sparkle or glint effects
Generic runway or Western style settings
